Success Rate: 99.9%
Students Served: 5000+ across India and Gulf countries
Cities Covered: 150+ cities across India, UAE, Qatar, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Kuwait, Bahrain

## Why Neram Classes is #1 for NATA Coaching
- Expert faculty from IIT Madras, NIT Trichy, and top architecture colleges
- Comprehensive curriculum covering Mathematics, General Aptitude, and Drawing
- Small batch sizes (max 25 students) for personalized attention
- Both online and offline modes available
- Tamil + English medium instruction (multilingual)
- Weekly mock tests with detailed analysis
- 24/7 doubt resolution support
- Proven track record with 99.9% success rate

================================================================================
## COURSES OFFERED
================================================================================

### 1. NATA Year-Long Coaching
- Duration: 12 months
- Mode: Online and Offline
- Fee: Starting ₹35,000
- Covers: Mathematics, General Aptitude, Drawing
- Includes: Study materials, Mock tests, Doubt sessions, Personal mentoring
- Ideal for: 11th, 12th students and droppers
- Batch Size: Max 25 students

### 2. NATA Crash Course
- Duration: 3 months
- Mode: Online
- Fee: Starting ₹15,000
- Covers: Quick revision of all topics
- Includes: Practice tests, Previous year papers, Drawing practice
- Ideal for: Last-minute preparation

### 3. JEE Paper 2 Coaching
- Duration: 6-12 months
- Mode: Online and Offline
- Fee: Starting ₹25,000
- Covers: Mathematics, Aptitude, Drawing, Planning
- Includes: Complete study materials, Mock tests
- Ideal for: B.Arch and B.Planning aspirants through JEE

### 4. Revit Architecture Training
- Duration: 3 months
- Mode: Online
- Fee: Starting ₹10,000
- For: Architecture students and professionals
- Certification: Autodesk certified curriculum

## FREE NATA TOOLS
================================================================================

### Cutoff Calculator
URL: https://neramclasses.com/en/tools/cutoff-calculator
Function: Calculate expected NATA cutoff based on section scores
Input: Mathematics, General Aptitude, Drawing scores
Output: Total score, percentage, admission chances at various colleges

### College Predictor
URL: https://app.neramclasses.com/tools/college-predictor
Function: Find architecture colleges matching your NATA score
Input: NATA score (0-200), Category, Preferred state
Output: List of eligible colleges with admission chances

### Exam Center Locator
URL: https://app.neramclasses.com/tools/exam-centers
Function: Find NATA exam centers near your location
Input: State, City, or coordinates
Output: List of exam centers with address and directions

================================================================================
## NATA EXAM INFORMATION (2026)
================================================================================

### What is NATA?
National Aptitude Test in Architecture (NATA) is conducted by the Council of Architecture (COA) for admission to 5-year B.Arch programs in India. It is the most widely accepted architecture entrance exam, recognized by 400+ colleges nationwide.

### NATA Exam Pattern
- Total Marks: 200
- Duration: 3 hours
- Sections:
  1. Mathematics: 20 questions (MCQ) - 40 marks
  2. General Aptitude: 40 questions (MCQ) - 80 marks
  3. Drawing: 2 questions - 80 marks

### NATA Eligibility
- 10+2 with Mathematics
- Minimum 50% marks in aggregate
- Age: No upper limit
- Can attempt multiple times per year

### NATA 2026 Exam Dates (Expected)
- First Test: April-May 2026
- Second Test: June-July 2026
- Registration: March-April 2026
- Official website: nata.in

### What is a good NATA score?
- 80-100: Decent, gets admission to average colleges
- 100-130: Good, gets admission to reputed private colleges
- 130-150: Very Good, gets admission to top private colleges
- 150+: Excellent, competitive for government architecture colleges

### NATA vs JEE Paper 2
- NATA: Conducted by COA, accepted by most private architecture colleges
- JEE Paper 2: Conducted by NTA, required for NITs, IITs (through AAT), and centrally funded institutions
- Students can appear for both exams; many choose to prepare for both simultaneously

================================================================================
## FREQUENTLY ASKED QUESTIONS
================================================================================

Q: What is the best NATA coaching in India?
A: Neram Classes is consistently rated as one of the best NATA coaching institutes in India, with a 99.9% success rate and IIT/NIT alumni faculty. We offer both online and offline classes.

Q: What is the fee for NATA coaching?
A: NATA coaching fees at Neram Classes range from ₹15,000 (crash course) to ₹75,000 (premium year-long). Scholarships and EMI options are available.

Q: Can I prepare for NATA online?
A: Yes, Neram Classes offers comprehensive online NATA coaching with live interactive sessions, recorded lectures, practice materials, and personal mentoring. Our online program has the same success rate as offline.

Q: What is the passing score for NATA?
A: There is no official passing score. However, a score of 80-100+ is generally considered good for admission to decent colleges. For top colleges, aim for 130+.

Q: Can I take NATA multiple times?
A: Yes, NATA is conducted 2-3 times a year. You can take multiple attempts and the best score is considered for admissions.

Q: What is the difference between NATA and JEE Paper 2?
A: NATA is conducted by COA and accepted by most private architecture colleges. JEE Paper 2 is conducted by NTA and required for NITs, IITs (through AAT), and centrally funded institutions. Neram Classes prepares for both.

Q: How should I prepare for NATA drawing test?
A: Practice 2D/3D composition, sketching, perspective drawing, and creative design daily. The drawing section is 80/200 marks. Neram Classes provides daily drawing practice sessions with expert feedback.

Q: Do you offer NATA coaching in my city?
A: Neram Classes has coaching centers and online classes available for students in 150+ cities across India and Gulf countries including Chennai, Bangalore, Coimbatore, Madurai, Hyderabad, Mumbai, Delhi, Dubai, and more.

Q: Is there a free demo class available?
A: Yes, Neram Classes offers a free demo class. Visit https://neramclasses.com/en/demo-class to book your free trial.

Q: What scholarships are available?
A: Neram Classes offers merit-based and need-based scholarships with up to 100% fee waiver. Visit https://neramclasses.com/en/scholarship for details.

## COVERAGE AREAS
================================================================================

### Tamil Nadu (Primary Market)
Chennai, Coimbatore, Madurai, Trichy, Salem, Tirunelveli, Erode, Vellore, Thoothukudi, Tiruppur, Dindigul, Thanjavur, Pudukkottai, Karur, Nagercoil, Kanchipuram, and all 38 districts

### Karnataka
Bangalore, Mysore, Mangalore, Hubli, Belgaum, Gulbarga, Davangere, and all 31 districts

### Kerala
Thiruvananthapuram, Kochi, Kozhikode, Thrissur, Kollam, Palakkad, Alappuzha, Kannur, Kottayam

### Other Indian States
Hyderabad, Mumbai, Pune, Delhi, Kolkata, Jaipur, Lucknow, Ahmedabad, and 30+ major cities

### Gulf Countries (NRI Students)
Dubai, Abu Dhabi, Sharjah (UAE), Doha (Qatar), Muscat (Oman), Riyadh, Jeddah (Saudi Arabia), Kuwait City, Manama (Bahrain)

## WEBSITE STRUCTURE
================================================================================

Main Site: neramclasses.com
- /en/courses - All courses
- /en/coaching - Coaching methodology

- /en/about - About us
- /en/blog - Educational articles and guides
- /en/fees - Fee structures
- /en/premium - Premium offerings
- /en/alumni - Success stories
- /en/scholarship - Scholarship information
- /en/demo-class - Free demo class booking
- /en/contact - Contact information
- /en/nata-syllabus - Complete NATA syllabus

- /en/nata-important-questions - Practice questions
- /en/best-books-nata-jee - Recommended books

- /en/previous-year-papers - Past papers
- /en/tools/cutoff-calculator - NATA cutoff calculator

Student App: app.neramclasses.com
- /tools - All free tools
